space_control: Maximize safe movable space by avoiding dead-ends, keeping escape routes open, and prioritizing positions that preserve maximum freedom. Veto moves that trap the snake or significantly reduce accessible cells. Maintain defensive positioning.
hazard: Avoid all edges, corners, and cells adjacent to hazard zones that could cut off escape routes. Treat hazard cells as hard walls; never move near them unless unavoidable. Prioritize safe internal board positioning over food when risk exists.
